positive: A whimsical, detailed watercolor illustration of a grumpy badger wearing a tiny top hat, sitting in a field of bioluminescent mushrooms at twilight. Style of Studio Ghibli meets Beatrix Potter. Vibrant colors, high detail, storybook quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grayscale, boring
